appDesc.message: Isebtar i yellan ddaw-a sɛan aseɣwen ɣer Youtube (uqbel meṛṛa n tɣawsiwin yettwassnen & tuffra n tuffra) + reffirects YouTube Shorts + blocks thumbnail ads

mode_adBlock.message: Isebtar i yellan ddaw-a sɛan aseɣ

helptip_restoreDislikes.message: Sken isefka n tuqqna s useqdec n tuqqna n tuqqna YouTube

helptip_shortsBlock.message: Ffren iferdisen seg uḍebsi n uxxam + iferdisen

helptip_playablesBlock.message: Ffren iferdisen seg usuffeɣ deg usmel n uxxam

helptip_adBlock.message: Ffren ifuyla n yiɣewwaren n usenfaṛ n usenfaṛ n usenfaṛ

helptip_aiBlock.message: Ffeḍ isefka n AI seg uxxam + isefka n tvidyutin

helptip_notifDisabled.message: Sken isallen melmi ara d-sbedden isenfaren/isenfaren
